hooks.command: bash -c 'tool=codex; root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; script="$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then bash "$script" "$tool"; else printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"agent-pipeline hook could not find hooks/session-start.sh. Reinstall the pipeline plugin or copy hooks/ into this repo.\"}}\n"; fi'

bash -c 'tool=codex; root="${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then tool=claude; root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; fi; script="$root/hooks/edit-streak.sh"; if [ -f "$script" ]; then bash "$script" "$tool"; fi'
